title: Vintage Photography
description: Changes how the camera in Exposure looks to resemble the camera from Bedrock Education Edition. Also changes the films.
body:
A resource-pack that alters the camera from the splendid [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) mod to resemble the camera from Bedrocks: Education Edition. It also alters the films & their relevent slots in GUIs. 


![An image of an old timey camera with gray & gold film to it's right.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae850cc79dba686b0d4ad6258c533cb33d3e637a.png)

This is my first attempt uploading a resource-pack, so apologies for any errors.
